nasb.text: and you shall have a spade among your tools, and it shall be when you sit down outside, you shall dig with it and shall turn to cover up your excrement.

esv.text: And you shall have a trowel with your tools, and when you sit down outside, you shall dig a hole with it and turn back and cover up your excrement.

cnv.text: 在你的器械中，要有一把鍬；你在外面便溺以後，可以用來鏟土，轉身把糞便掩蓋。

ccb.text: 你们每人都要有一把铲子，便溺时要挖个洞，事后要掩埋。
